typecheck.command: echo "No typecheck configured for this project"

blockingIssues.description: STRUCTURAL_AUDIT.md omits `.git/` from root-level classification despite the contract requiring classification for every root-level item.
STRUCTURAL_AUDIT.md uses non-contract categories (`PRODUCTION (mixed)` and `mixed`) rather than the required category set.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify how mixed-content top-level directories must be classified in structural audits (e.g., classify at root path level using only allowed categories, with rationale in notes).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for `audit-structural-analysis` found use of non-canonical labels (`PRODUCTION (mixed)` and `mixed`) and a missing root item classification.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit guidance to handle aggressive `.gitignore` setups (e.g., mention `git add -f` for required markdown artifacts when necessary).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer shared-state observation and worker skill feedback indicated confusion around writing audit markdown artifacts when broad ignore patterns may exist.
